prompt_template.system: Predict whether the stock's closing price will rise or fall on the target date. Use the provided historical price information and tweets. Return ONLY a JSON object with exactly one key: "label". Allowed labels are "Rise" and "Fall".

publication.reason: Published in the normal ST312 artifact structure as a public artifact with an upstream rights and redistribution caution.

notes: The official archive does not ship split files or cut dates.
The paper states only that the split is chronological.
ST312 therefore derives the train/valid/test split over sorted unique target trading dates within the paper window after excluding neutral-band rows.
